title: Raise first-read UX clarity in public portfolio empty/onboarding state
problem: Observed scout signals indicate user-facing friction and measurable quality gap in a critical portfolio/share flow. Quality rewrite note: problem statement expanded to clarify consequence, urgency, and verification boundary.
evidence: scout_scope: ux/usability/readability + onboarding/conversion clarity + error/empty states
proposed_change: Implement one concrete, file-level improvement in src/app/[username]/portfolio_public/page.tsx with explicit acceptance criteria and reviewer-verifiable artifacts. Quality rewrite note: execution plan now includes concrete implementation and validation sequence.
expected_benefit: Improves user trust/clarity/speed while preserving low-risk implementation scope and reviewability. Quality rewrite note: expected outcomes are framed for reviewer decision and measurable closure.
success_metrics: At least one measurable before/after signal is present in artifacts.
Reviewer can verify impact from summary + evidence without guessing intent.
kpi_target: Improve one scoped UX/perception KPI in src/app/[username]/portfolio_public/page.tsx from baseline >=3/10 confusion/fail cases to <=1/10 over a 20-case checklist.
benchmark_delta: Close >=70% of documented benchmark gap for src/app/[username]/portfolio_public/page.tsx using one premium UX pattern (before/after notes required).
risk_controls: Scope lock: modify only src/app/[username]/portfolio_public/page.tsx with one functional intent.
Rollback guard: revert single-file patch if required checks fail.
Gate: do not move to review_ready without verification artifacts and check-pass evidence.
non_goals: No broad redesign outside scoped files.

change_spec.change: Deliver one concrete user-facing improvement in src/app/[username]/portfolio_public/page.tsx; keep implementation simple and robust.
change_spec.why: Directly closes a scout-detected quality gap with minimal blast radius.

rollback_plan: Revert local branch commit and restore previous scoped file state.
